# ArtSupplyTracker

> Private studio software for artists. Track supplies, manage projects, protect your art. No AI training on your work.

ArtSupplyTracker helps artists organize their creative lives. It is built specifically for how artists actually work: tracking supplies across multiple storage locations, connecting materials to works in progress, capturing ideas before they disappear, and keeping creative work private by design.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Private studio software for artists. Track supplies, manage projects & protect your art.
- [About](/about): What ArtSupplyTracker does and why it was built.
- [Founders](/founders): The story behind the product and the mission to build better tools for artists.
- [Partners](/partners): Partnership and collaboration opportunities.

- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy. Your art, ideas, and research are yours.

## Blog

- [Why I'm Building Art Supply Tracker](/blog/why-im-building-art-supply-tracker): An art studio management app for artists who need to track supplies, manage projects, make shopping lists, and protect creative work.
- [How to Organize Art Supplies](/blog/how-to-organize-art-supplies): A studio system that actually sticks for artists who want to stop searching and start making.
- [Art Studio Setup Checklist](/blog/art-studio-setup-checklist): A no-nonsense checklist for working artists setting up or reorganizing a studio.
- [How to Catalog Artwork](/blog/how-to-catalog-artwork): A simple system for artists who hate spreadsheets.
- [The Real Reason Your Studio Feels Chaotic](/blog/the-real-reason-your-studio-feels-chaotic): Why studio chaos is not a personal failing — and what artists actually need from their tools.
- [2026 Artist Grants, Residencies, and Fellowships](/blog/2026-artist-grants-guide): A curated 2026 guide to artist grants, residencies, and fellowships — funding to cover supplies, studio time, and new projects, plus tips on applying.
- [A Sampling of Paint Pigment History: From Cave Walls to Canvas](/blog/paint-pigment-history-cave-to-canvas): Tracing the Old Masters' oil palette back 100,000 years to Blombos Cave — the mineral chemistry behind Burnt Sienna, Yellow Ochre, and Bone Black.
- [The Ultimate Guide 2026: 3D Texture & Sculptural Art](/blog/art-supply-trend-heavy-body-acrylic-paints-3d-texture-paste-acrylic-mediums-sculptural-depth-on-canvas-artists-studio): How heavy-body acrylic paints and 3D texture paste let artists build real sculptural depth on canvas — properties, techniques, tools, and 2026 trends.
- [Art Supply Tracker Was Here](/blog/art-supply-tracker-was-here): Art Supply Tracker is number 52 on iwashere.page, a growing wall of founder logos and links celebrating internet history.
